danger_signals.visual_form: Large enemy sprites with distinct visual design, occupying significant screen space
danger_signals.meaning: Imminent threat requiring skill and weapon mastery; stage climax

danger_signals.visual_form: Incoming bullets and energy attacks from enemies
danger_signals.meaning: Active danger requiring counter-timing or evasion

danger_signals.visual_form: Character damage animation and health bar reduction
danger_signals.meaning: Accumulated damage risk; proximity to failure state

danger_signals.visual_form: Ammunition bar running empty for equipped weapons
danger_signals.meaning: Reduced offensive capability; forced reliance on weak zero force

safety_signals.visual_form: Maximum health bar display; character appears undamaged
safety_signals.meaning: Access to Phoenix Force dash ability; peak combat readiness

safety_signals.visual_form: Short levels with weak enemies between boss encounters
safety_signals.meaning: Opportunity to recover, practice weapon switching, prepare for next threat
Resource restoration; readiness for upcoming encounters

faction_indicators.enemy_visual_variants: Members display distinct designs (Xi-Tiger as leader figure); bosses represent Scarlet operatives and aligned forces
faction_indicators.environmental_markers: Laboratory and research facility locations; spacecraft and technological environments represent Scarlet infrastructure

faction_indicators.enemy_visual_variants: Epsilon-Eagle represents heroic A-Human; genetically engineered super-soldiers appear as boss adversaries
faction_indicators.environmental_markers: A-Earth research laboratories; technological and biological hybrid environments

faction_indicators.enemy_visual_variants: Player character shows dual personality split; morphs between contained and revealed forms
faction_indicators.environmental_markers: Spaces previously occupied by Scarlet; environments progressively conquered through boss defeats

world_state_to_visual.visual_manifestation: Stages filled with enemy soldiers and infrastructure; boss encounters represent Scarlet power structure
world_state_to_visual.behavioral_manifestation: Multiple challenging bosses (26 total across 25 stages); enemies actively hostile and well-organized

world_state_to_visual.visual_manifestation: Shift from organized Scarlet presence to more unstable enemy patterns; increased intensity and aggression
world_state_to_visual.behavioral_manifestation: Boss battles intensify; Xi-Tiger actively hunting Epsilon; pursuit theme dominates narrative progression

world_state_to_visual.visual_manifestation: Epsilon's capabilities expand visually through Phoenix Force activation; character morphs and reveals power
world_state_to_visual.behavioral_manifestation: Player gains access to more devastating attacks; counter mechanics enable health conversion from enemy fire

world_state_to_visual.visual_manifestation: Environments show signs of dimensional instability; mix of familiar and alien architecture
world_state_to_visual.behavioral_manifestation: Story context explains Epsilon's scattered resurrection within a host body; dual personality conflict manifests

environmental_storytelling.example: A-Human research laboratory represents site of Xi-Tiger's assassination plot and hostage situation; location where Epsilon's resurrection is discovered
26 sequential boss encounters represent hierarchy and operatives within Scarlet organization; defeating each visually represents dismantling organization structure
Short stages between bosses convey downtime and preparation phases in extended conflict; minimal enemy presence suggests stages are functional corridors to next confrontation
Six distinct weapons (Buster, Ranger, Flame, Homing, Sword, Lancer) represent diverse tactical options; player choice of four weapons before game start reflects preparation for known threats

entity_behavioral_tells.behavior: Access to Phoenix Force; dash becomes deadly area-damage move; visual indicator of peak combat capability
Restricted to basic movement and standard weapon fire; Phoenix Force unavailable; vulnerability increases
Forced to use Zero Force (very weak, very short range); significant damage penalty; tactical desperation state

entity_behavioral_tells.state: Near Epsilon with counter force active
entity_behavioral_tells.behavior: Projectiles convert to health for Epsilon; enemy offense becomes health resource if timed correctly
Different parts take variable damage; cumulative damage from Phoenix Force and Counter Force indicates complex weak-point system; behavior changes as parts destroyed
Weak and sparse; minimal threat; serve as weapon practice and ammo farming opportunities rather than real danger

notes: Alien Soldier is a boss-encounter-focused action game where world-state communication derives primarily from stage progression and boss design rather than environmental narratives. The dual personality split of Epsilon creates internal conflict manifested through gameplay mechanics (Phoenix Force, counter abilities). Scarlet's organization is communicated through sequential boss defeats representing hierarchy dismantling. Faction identity relies on character roles (Xi-Tiger antagonist, Epsilon protagonist) rather than visual markers like colors or symbols. Safety/danger states are mechanically encoded through health bars, ammo depletion, and ability access. The world-state shift from organized Scarlet control to desperate Xi-Tiger pursuit is conveyed through narrative premise rather than visual environmental transformation.
